description_long: This bungalow is a compact residential building set on a rectangular grassy plot with a raised stone foundation. The structure features a steeply pitched gable roof with brown shingles and a prominent front-facing gable. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of brick and lighter siding, with the front facade showcasing two large windows and a covered porch supported by wooden posts. The porch extends across part of the front and side, providing a sheltered entryway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side elevations, while the rear is simpler with minimal fenestration. The overall design is traditional, evoking a cozy suburban or rural home.
description: A traditional brick and siding bungalow with a steep gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and two large front windows beneath the gable.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and a mostly blank wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple facade with a single door and fewer windows, plus the stone foundation.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the symmetrical window arrangement, front porch, and the main gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
